paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: Three-phase pre-training combining linguistic, dialog, and grounded dialog objectives, enabling goal-directed dialogue generation with utility-focused evaluation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Public web documents, Reddit comment chains (147M dialog sessions, 6B tokens), DSTC7 Task 2 corpus, MS MARCO, UnifiedQA, Schema-Guided Dialog, Wizard of Wikipedia, Wizard of Internet, MultiWOZ
raw_extraction.application: Goal-directed dialogue, task-oriented conversational agents, knowledge-grounded response generation, conversational question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing large-scale pre-trained language models for goal-directed dialogue that achieve utility-driven performance through extrinsic evaluation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Dialog Context Modeling, Grounded Dialog Generation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning for goal-directed dialogue tasks requiring external knowledge grounding
raw_extraction.extension: Byte-level Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenization implemented via Hugging Face
raw_extraction.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of GODEL Base with doubled layers and embedding dimensions, optimized for goal-directed dialogue tasks requiring higher contextual understanding.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Public web documents, Reddit comment chains (147M dialog sessions, 6B tokens), DSTC7 Task 2 corpus, MS MARCO, UnifiedQA, Schema-Guided Dialog, Wizard of Wikipedia, Wizard of Internet, MultiWOZ
raw_extraction.application: Goal-directed dialogue, task-oriented conversational agents, knowledge-grounded response generation, conversational question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing large-scale pre-trained language models for goal-directed dialogue that achieve utility-driven performance through extrinsic evaluation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), Dialog Context Modeling, Grounded Dialog Generation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning for goal-directed dialogue tasks requiring external knowledge grounding
raw_extraction.extension: Byte-level Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenization implemented via Hugging Face
raw_extraction.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: Extremely large-scale model initialized from GPT-3 (due to licensing constraints, a substitute model based on GPT-J was released), designed for advanced goal-directed dialogue capabilities with enhanced utility.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Public web documents, Reddit comment chains (147M dialog sessions, 6B tokens), DSTC7 Task 2 corpus, MS MARCO, UnifiedQA, Schema-Guided Dialog, Wizard of Wikipedia, Wizard of Internet, MultiWOZ
raw_extraction.application: Advanced goal-directed dialogue, complex task-oriented conversational agents, highly knowledge-grounded response generation
raw_extraction.license: Closed Source (GPT-3 initialization), Open Source (GPT-J substitute)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing large-scale pre-trained language models for goal-directed dialogue that achieve utility-driven performance through extrinsic evaluation.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning for goal-directed dialogue tasks requiring external knowledge grounding
raw_extraction.extension: Substitute model based on GPT-J for practical deployment due to licensing restrictions
raw_extraction.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **grounded pre-training** for goal-directed dialog by incorporating external knowledge sources into the pre-training process, enabling the model to handle task-oriented and knowledge-grounded conversations.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered Reddit dataset (25% of original after social media filtering)
raw_extraction.application: Task-oriented dialog systems, knowledge-grounded conversation, goal-directed chatbots, multi-domain dialog modeling (e.g., MultiWOZ, Wizard-of-Wikipedia, Wizard-of-Internet, CoQA).
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (code, models, and dataset extraction scripts available upon request)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Goal-directed dialog systems capable of handling task-oriented and knowledge-grounded interactions while ensuring utility, humanness, and safety.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot and full fine-tuning for goal-directed dialog tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Social media data filtering pipeline to reduce toxicity and bias in training corpora.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: **Scalable grounded pre-training** for larger models, improving performance on complex goal-directed dialog tasks through enhanced contextual grounding and task-specific fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered Reddit dataset (25% of original after social media filtering)
raw_extraction.application: Task-oriented dialog systems, knowledge-grounded conversation, goal-directed chatbots, multi-domain dialog modeling (e.g., MultiWOZ, Wizard-of-Wikipedia, Wizard-of-Internet, CoQA).
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (code, models, and dataset extraction scripts available upon request)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Goal-directed dialog systems capable of handling task-oriented and knowledge-grounded interactions while ensuring utility, humanness, and safety.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot and full fine-tuning for goal-directed dialog tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Social media data filtering pipeline to reduce toxicity and bias in training corpora.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: **Extends grounded pre-training to massive scale**, demonstrating improved performance on complex goal-directed dialog tasks by leveraging a significantly larger parameter count and broader training data.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered Reddit dataset (25% of original after social media filtering) + additional large-scale text corpora
raw_extraction.application: Advanced task-oriented dialog systems, knowledge-grounded conversation, goal-directed chatbots, multi-domain dialog modeling (e.g., MultiWOZ, Wizard-of-Wikipedia, Wizard-of-Internet, CoQA).
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (code, models, and dataset extraction scripts available upon request)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Goal-directed dialog systems capable of handling task-oriented and knowledge-grounded interactions while ensuring utility, humanness, and safety.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot fine-tuning for goal-directed dialog tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Social media data filtering pipeline to reduce toxicity and bias in training corpora, combined with integration of structured knowledge sources for grounded pre-training.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: Structured fusion network architecture for goal-directed dialogue pre-training, enabling integration of external knowledge sources into dialogue generation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Multi-domain dialogue corpora including MultiWOZ, Wizard of Wikipedia, Wizard of Internet, and CoQA
raw_extraction.application: Goal-oriented conversational agents, knowledge-grounded dialogue systems, multi-domain task completion
raw_extraction.research_problem: Goal-directed dialogue systems capable of handling complex user intents and knowledge-grounded responses
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Goal-directed dialogue pre-training with structured fusion networks
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot and full fine-tuning for goal-oriented dialogue systems
raw_extraction.extension: Structured fusion networks for integrating external knowledge sources during dialogue generation.
raw_extraction.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: Larger-scale variant of GODELB with improved performance on knowledge-grounded dialogue tasks using T5 architecture.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Multi-domain dialogue corpora including MultiWOZ, Wizard of Wikipedia, Wizard of Internet, and CoQA
raw_extraction.application: Knowledge-grounded conversational agents, multi-turn task-oriented dialogue systems
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalability and generalization of goal-directed dialogue systems across diverse domains
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Goal-directed dialogue pre-training with structured fusion networks
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot and full fine-tuning for goal-oriented dialogue systems
raw_extraction.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog

raw_extraction.innovation: Decoder-only architecture (based on GPT-J) for abstractive knowledge-grounded dialogue generation, contrasting with extractive behavior of encoder-decoder models like GODELB/GODELL.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Multi-domain dialogue corpora augmented with GPT-J architecture
raw_extraction.application: Creative knowledge-grounded conversations, abstractive response generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Abstractive knowledge-grounded dialogue generation with factual consistency
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Autoregressive next-token prediction with goal-directed dialogue data
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Few-shot fine-tuning for abstractive knowledge-grounded dialogue generation
raw_extraction.extension: Decoder-only architecture enables more abstractive responses but requires alternative evaluation metrics due to reduced BLEU scores
raw_extraction.paper_title: GODEL: Large-Scale Pre-Training for Goal-Directed Dialog
